issues.description: Missing second action: 'turn all of your Life cards face-down' (FlipLife action). DSL only includes Rest action but card text contains two sequential effects connected by 'Then'.
Rest action target should allow 0 selection ('up to 1' means optional). Current maxCost specification is correct, but target needs to clarify optionality via minCount or similar constraint.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] DON!! −1: Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less. Then, turn all of your Life cards face-down.
